validation.passwordRequirement: At least 6 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, and one digit. Special characters (!@#$%^&*) are optional.
validation.passwordMax: Password must be at most 30 characters

login.heroSubtitle: Your gateway to knowledge. Access courses, track progress, and connect with a community of learners.
login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey
login.signUpSubtitle: Sign up to start your learning journey
login.toastActivateDesc: Check your email for a code, or resend from the next screen.
login.accountCreated: Account created. Verify your email to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We will email you a verification code.
forgotPassword.toastSent: If an account exists, we sent reset instructions.

PASSWORD_RESET.title: Verify it's you
PASSWORD_RESET.body: Enter the 6-digit code from your email to continue. Codes expire after a short time for your security.

EMAIL_CHANGE.title: Confirm your new email
EMAIL_CHANGE.body: We sent a code to the address below. Enter it here to complete the update.

ACCOUNT_ACTIVATION.title: You're almost in
ACCOUNT_ACTIVATION.body: Check your inbox for a 6-digit code. Add us to your contacts if you don't see it within a minute.

verify.codeHint: Your code is single-use and never shared with anyone.
verify.addEmailHint: Add your email, then enter the 6-digit code from your message.
verify.sameEmailHint: Use the same email you entered when you signed up or requested a reset.
verify.spamHint: Check spam or promotions. You can resend if the code does not arrive.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.toastStartOver: Start from forgot password and verify your code first.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can sign in.

chatPage.title: AI help
chatPage.subtitle: Choose a course for focused answers • Replies instantly
chatPage.leaveChatAria: Leave chat and go to the previous screen

helpCenter.helpCenterWelcome: Welcome! Pick a language to continue.
helpCenter.helpCenterSelectCourseHint: For clearer, more accurate answers, choose a course above after picking a language — then ask your question.
helpCenter.helpCenterLanguageSelected: Language saved. How would you like to pick a course?
helpCenter.helpCenterAllCoursesPrompt: Pick a course from the list below.
helpCenter.helpCenterCategoryCoursesPrompt: Here are the courses in this category. Select one.
helpCenter.helpCenterReplyError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
helpCenter.helpCenterHistoryLoadError: Could not load history. You can still chat below.
helpCenter.helpCenterFabAria: Open AI assistant — help with courses and questions
helpCenter.helpCenterSidebarSubtitle: Pick a language, then a course for more accurate answers.
helpCenter.helpCenterHintSidebar: Pick a language, then browse by category or open all courses.
helpCenter.helpCenterHintMobile: Tap “Course” to choose language and training.

landing.heroTitle: Learn smarter with an AI that knows your courses
landing.heroSubtitle: Ask anything about trainings, paths, and schedules—then invite friends and save on your next enrollment.
landing.chatSectionTitle: A friendly chatbot for every question
landing.chatSectionBody: Example messages show how the assistant explains modules, deadlines, and what to study next—clearly and calmly.
landing.chatBullet1: Plain-language answers grounded in your course catalog
landing.chatBullet2: Warm tone that feels approachable, not robotic
landing.chatBullet3: Same assistant from the floating button—always one tap away
landing.chatBubbleUser1: What's the best order to finish the Data Fundamentals modules?
landing.chatBubbleAi1: Start with Foundations, then SQL basics, then Visualization. Each quiz builds on the last—aim for one module every 3–4 days if you're part-time.
landing.chatBubbleUser2: Can I pause and resume later without losing progress?
landing.chatBubbleAi2: Yes. Progress saves automatically. When you're back, continue from the last completed lesson—you won't need to repeat quizzes you already passed.
landing.referralLeadSubtitle: Your codes and rewards live here—pick a campaign and share in one tap.
landing.referralProgramsEmpty: No referral programs are available yet.

referralSteps.title: Share your referral code
referralSteps.body: Send your personal link or code in one tap.

referralSteps.title: Friends sign up
referralSteps.body: They create an account using your invite.

referralSteps.title: You get rewards
referralSteps.body: At three successful invites, your 5% discount activates.

referralPrograms.title: Invite 3 friends, get 5% off
referralPrograms.subtitle: Share your code. When three people sign up with it, your discount unlocks automatically on your next purchase.
referralPrograms.progressHint: Invite one more friend to unlock your 5% discount.

referralPrograms.title: Fill a study group, unlock 10%
referralPrograms.subtitle: When five learners enroll with your team code, your cohort unlocks a deeper discount on the selected bundle.
referralPrograms.progressHint: Two more teammates to reach the 10% unlock.

landing.t1Quote: The AI broke down the syllabus faster than my study group. Night-and-day clarity.
landing.t2Quote: Referring teammates was effortless—we all enrolled with a code and I saved on my renewal.
landing.t3Quote: Feels human, not robotic. I keep the chat open while I watch lessons.
